scripts.format: biome format --write package.json pnpm-workspace.yaml tsconfig.json turbo.json .vscode apps packages/ui --files-ignore-unknown=true
scripts.format:check: biome format package.json pnpm-workspace.yaml tsconfig.json turbo.json .vscode apps packages/ui --files-ignore-unknown=true
scripts.format:all: biome format --write package.json pnpm-workspace.yaml tsconfig.json turbo.json .vscode apps packages/ui --files-ignore-unknown=true
scripts.lint:fix: pnpm --filter landing lint:fix && pnpm --filter web lint:fix && pnpm --filter @workspace/ui lint:fix
